name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Forex Alert Bot

Get notified when a currency pair crosses your target price.

Tap 🔔 New alert to create one, or 📋 My alerts to see your active alerts.

You can also type:
• /alert EUR/USD 1.1000 above
• /list — see all your alerts
• /cancel [id] — cancel an alert

Tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
